sombongo_turns.display_text: Hey! I can't find my sombrero. [Did I give it to you / ¿Te lo di?]

suggested_replies.text_native: Yes, you gave it to me
suggested_replies.text_target: Sí, me lo diste

suggested_replies.text_native: No, you didn't give it to me
suggested_replies.text_target: No, no me lo diste

suggested_replies.text_native: You gave it to your brother
suggested_replies.text_target: Se lo diste a tu hermano

sombongo_turns.display_text: [Of course / Por supuesto], now I remember. I just [realized / me di cuenta] how stunning I look, [even though / aunque] I'm not wearing a sombrero. Don't you think so?

suggested_replies.text_native: Yeah, you look great!
suggested_replies.text_target: Sí, te ves genial

suggested_replies.text_native: I think I look better than you
suggested_replies.text_target: Creo que me veo mejor que tú

suggested_replies.text_native: I think your brother looks better than you
suggested_replies.text_target: Creo que tu hermano se ve mejor que tú

sombongo_turns.display_text: [Stop pretending that / Deja de pretender que] you aren't jealous of me. Now when [did you see / viste] my brother?

suggested_replies.text_native: I saw him before you came to the party
suggested_replies.text_target: Lo vi antes de que llegaras a la fiesta

suggested_replies.text_native: I saw him after you came to the party
suggested_replies.text_target: Lo vi después de que llegaste a la fiesta

suggested_replies.text_native: I saw him at the same time you came to the party
suggested_replies.text_target: Lo vi al mismo tiempo que llegaste a la fiesta

display_text_options.display_text: [You must tell me / Debes decirme] what you thought about his outfit.
[Without a doubt / Sin duda], I'm the better brother.
How tragic! [He doesn't even know / Ni siquiera sabe] how to make an entrance.

sombongo_turns.display_text: [I just got out of / Acabo de salir de] the science class of Professor Ratus.

suggested_replies.text_native: I just got out of his class too
suggested_replies.text_target: Acabo de salir de su clase también

suggested_replies.text_native: I left his class early
suggested_replies.text_target: Me fui de su clase temprano

suggested_replies.text_native: I went to the gym instead of going to his class
suggested_replies.text_target: Fui al gimnasio en vez de ir a su clase

sombongo_turns.display_text: [Seriously? / ¿En serio?] [How often / ¿Con qué frecuencia] do you go to class?

suggested_replies.text_native: I always go to his class
suggested_replies.text_target: Siempre voy a su clase

suggested_replies.text_native: I sometimes go to his class
suggested_replies.text_target: A veces voy a su clase

suggested_replies.text_native: I never go to his class
suggested_replies.text_target: Nunca voy a su clase

sombongo_turns.display_text: What do you think of his class?

suggested_replies.text_native: I think his class is way too boring
suggested_replies.text_target: Creo que su clase es demasiado aburrida

suggested_replies.text_native: I think his class is quite boring
suggested_replies.text_target: Creo que su clase es bastante aburrida

suggested_replies.text_native: I think his class is a little boring
suggested_replies.text_target: Creo que su clase es un poco aburrida

display_text_options.display_text: [At least / Al menos] you have someone as magnificent as me in your class.
[Unless / A menos que] someone tells him, his class will always be that way.
Well, I find his class relaxing. [In fact / De hecho], I fall asleep every single time!

sombongo_turns.display_text: Hey, [did I tell you this / ¿te dije esto?] [Once in a while / De vez en cuando], I enjoy taking you on a shopping trip with me.

suggested_replies.text_native: I told you that I don't like shopping with you
suggested_replies.text_target: Te dije que no me gusta ir de compras contigo

suggested_replies.text_native: Your brother told me to never go shopping with you
suggested_replies.text_target: Tu hermano me dijo que nunca fuera de compras contigo

suggested_replies.text_native: You told me that you don't like shopping with me
suggested_replies.text_target: Me dijiste que no te gusta ir de compras conmigo

sombongo_turns.display_text: [Don't get difficult / No te pongas difícil] conmigo. [It makes me angry / Me pone enojado] when people don't do as I say.

suggested_replies.text_native: I have to think about it first
suggested_replies.text_target: Tengo que pensarlo primero

suggested_replies.text_native: You have to calm down first
suggested_replies.text_target: Tienes que calmarte primero

suggested_replies.text_native: Ok, but your brother has to come too
suggested_replies.text_target: Vale, pero tu hermano también tiene que venir

sombongo_turns.display_text: [So that you understand me / Para que me entiendas], YOU'RE COMING NO MATTER WHAT!!

suggested_replies.text_native: Ok, but the important thing is that you drive
suggested_replies.text_target: Vale, pero lo importante es que conduzcas

sombongo_turns.display_text: Absolutely not! I don't want to drive [at all / para nada]. I'm too fabulous for that.
